content: I will write a script to search the transcript logs specifically for all `view_file` tool results matching `App.tsx` and extract their content, ignoring any length thresholds.
thinking:
**Investigating Source Reconstruction**

I've discovered that outputs in `app_tsx_dump_1564.json` are, frustratingly, also truncated. I'm now trying to figure out if it's possible to reconstruct `src/App.tsx` from the initial tool call of this session. That first call was `default_api:view_file` using the absolute path `c:/Users/paloptical/Documents/Pal Optical Documents/`.

args.ArtifactMetadata: {"ArtifactType":"other","Summary":"Created find_view_app_tsx.cjs to extract App.tsx content from any view_file tool output logged in transcript.jsonl."}
